[[Captain/Legends|Captain]] '''Sandrex Olotho''' was a [[Spy/Legends|spy]] for [[Grand Moff/Legends|Grand Moff]] [[Wilhuff Tarkin/Legends|Wilhuff Tarkin]] in [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Inos Fonada]]'s chain of command. She went on to serve Fonada when he became a [[Warlord/Legends|warlord]].

==Biography==
Olotho began her spying career sometime prior to the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]. When Tarkin died aboard the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|first Death Star]], she remained in Fonada's service, eventually becoming Fonada's [[Adjutant/Legends|adjutant]]. Following the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], Fonada went warlord, and the skilled Olotho served as the admiral's eyes and ears on the battlefield.

Her career was distinguished by an incident where, while in the field, one of Fonada's trooper detachments defected to the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. Rallying the few remaining loyalists, she dug into a defensive position and planned her escape. By capturing several leathery-winged ''[[deshfinop]]s'', coating them with a slow-burning resin, and releasing them, she sowed confusion among the ranks of the defectors and set fires in their encampment. The disorganization that resulted allowed Olotho and her followers to break through enemy lines and escape, even successfully capturing a few New Republic soldiers in the process.
